name: Burning Blood
description: At the end of combat, heal 6 HP.

name: Cracked Core
description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Lightning.

name: Pure Water
description: At the start of each combat, add 1 Miracle into your hand.

name: Ring of the Snake
description: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.

name: Akabeko
description: Your first Attack each combat deals 8 additional damage.
flavor_text: "Muuu~"

name: Anchor
description: Start each combat with 10 Block.
flavor_text: Holding this miniature trinket, you feel heavier and more stable.

name: Ancient Tea Set
description: Whenever you enter a Rest Site, start the next combat with [Energy] [Energy] .
flavor_text: The key to a refreshing night's rest.

name: Art of War
description: If you do not play any Attacks during your turn, gain an additional [Energy] next turn.
flavor_text: This ancient manuscript contains wisdom from a past age.

name: Bag of Marbles
description: At the start of each combat, apply 1 [Vulnerable] to ALL enemies.
flavor_text: A once popular toy in the City. Useful for throwing enemies off balance.

name: Bag of Preparation
description: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.
flavor_text: Oversized adventurer's pack. Has many pockets and straps.

name: Blood Vial
description: At the start of each combat, heal 2 HP.
flavor_text: A vial containing the blood of a pure and elder vampire.

name: Bronze Scales
description: Start each combat with 3 [Thorns].
flavor_text: The sharp scales of the Guardian. Rearranges itself to protect its user.

name: Centennial Puzzle
description: The first time you lose HP each combat, draw 3 cards.
flavor_text: Upon solving the puzzle, you feel a powerful warmth in your chest.

name: Ceramic Fish
description: Whenever you add a card to your deck, gain 9 Gold.
flavor_text: Meticulously painted, these fish were revered to bring great fortune.

name: Damaru
description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [Mantra].
flavor_text: The sound of the small drum keeps your mind awake, revealing a path forward.

name: Data Disk
description: Start each combat with 1 [Focus].
flavor_text: This disk contains precious data on birds and snakes.

name: Dream Catcher
description: Whenever you Rest, you may add a card into your deck.
flavor_text: The northern tribes would often use dream catchers at night, believing they led to self improvement.

name: Happy Flower
description: Every 3 turns, gain [Energy] .
flavor_text: This unceasingly joyous plant is a popular novelty item among nobles.

name: Juzu Bracelet
description: Regular enemy combats are no longer encountered in ? rooms.
flavor_text: A ward against the unknown.

name: Lantern
description: Start each combat with an additional [Energy] .
flavor_text: An eerie lantern which illuminates only for the wielder.

name: Maw Bank
description: Whenever you climb a floor, gain 12 Gold. No longer works when you spend any Gold at a shop.
flavor_text: Surprisingly popular, despite maw attacks being a regular occurrence.
spawn_conditions: Below floor 49 and not in a shop

name: Meal Ticket
description: Whenever you enter a shop, heal 15 HP.
flavor_text: "Complimentary meatballs with every visit!"

name: Nunchaku
description: Every time you play 10 Attacks, gain [Energy] .
flavor_text: A good training tool. Improves the posture and agility of the wielder.

name: Oddly Smooth Stone
description: Start each combat with 1 [Dexterity].
flavor_text: You have never seen something so smooth and pristine. This must be the work of the Ancients.

name: Omamori
description: Negate the next 2 Curses you obtain.
flavor_text: A common charm for staving off vile spirits. This one seems to possess a spark of divine energy.

name: Orichalcum
description: If you end your turn without Block, gain 6 Block.
flavor_text: A green tinted metal of an unknown origin. Seemingly indestructible.

name: Pen Nib
description: Every 10th Attack you play deals double damage.
flavor_text: Holding the nib, you can see everyone ever slain by a previous owner of the pen. A violent history.

name: Potion Belt
description: Upon pickup, gain 2 Potion slots.
flavor_text: I can hold more Potions using this belt!

name: Preserved Insect
description: Enemies in Elite combats have 25% less HP.
flavor_text: The insect seems to create a shrinking aura that targets particularly large enemies.

name: Red Skull
description: While your HP is at or below 50%, you have 3 additional [Strength].
flavor_text: A small skull covered in ornamental paint.

name: Regal Pillow
description: Whenever you Rest, heal an additional 15 HP.
flavor_text: Now you can get a proper night's rest.

name: Smiling Mask
description: The Merchant's card removal service now always costs 50 Gold.
flavor_text: Mask worn by the Merchant. He must have spares...
spawn_conditions: Below floor 49 and not in a shop

name: Snecko Skull
description: Whenever you apply [Poison], apply an additional 1 [Poison].
flavor_text: A snecko skull in pristine condition. Mysteriously clean and smooth, dirt and grime fall off inexplicably.

name: Strawberry
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 7.
flavor_text: "Delicious! Haven't seen any of these since the blight." - Ranwid

name: The Boot
description: Whenever you would deal 4 or less unblocked attack damage, increase it to 5.
flavor_text: When wound up, the boot grows larger in size.

name: Tiny Chest
description: Every 4th ? room is a Treasure room.
flavor_text: "A fine prototype." - The Architect

name: Toy Ornithopter
description: Whenever you use a potion, heal 5 HP.
flavor_text: "This little toy is the perfect companion for the lone adventurer!"

name: Vajra
description: Start each combat with 1 [Strength].
flavor_text: An ornamental relic given to warriors displaying glory in battle.

name: War Paint
description: Upon pickup, Upgrade 2 random Skills.
flavor_text: In the past, Ironclads would create wards using enchanted war paint before charging into battle.

name: Whetstone
description: Upon pickup, Upgrade 2 random Attacks.
flavor_text: "Flesh never beats steel." - Kublai the Great

name: Blue Candle
description: Unplayable Curse cards can now be played. Whenever you play a Curse, lose 1 HP and Exhaust it.
flavor_text: The flame ignites when shrouded in darkness.

name: Bottled Flame
description: Upon pickup, choose an Attack. Start each combat with this card in your hand.
flavor_text: Inside the bottle resides a flame that eternally burns.

name: Bottled Lightning
description: Upon pickup, choose a Skill. Start each combat with this card in your hand.
flavor_text: Peering into the swirling maelstrom, you see a part of yourself staring back.

name: Bottled Tornado
description: Upon pickup, choose a Power card. Start each combat with this card in your hand.
flavor_text: The bottle gently hums and whirs.

name: Darkstone Periapt
description: Whenever you obtain a Curse, increase your Max HP by 6.
flavor_text: The stone draws power from dark energy, converting it into vitality for the wearer.

name: Duality
description: Whenever you play an Attack, gain 1 temporary [Dexterity].
flavor_text: "And the sun was extinguished forever, as if curtains fell before it." - Zoroth

name: Eternal Feather
description: For every 5 cards in your deck, heal 3 HP whenever you enter a Rest Site.
flavor_text: This feather appears to be completely indestructible. What bird does this possibly come from?

name: Frozen Egg
description: Whenever you add a Power card into your deck, Upgrade it.
flavor_text: The egg lies inert and frozen, never to hatch.

name: Gold-Plated Cables
description: Your rightmost Orb triggers its passive an additional time.
flavor_text: "Interesting! Even automatons are affected by placebo." - Ranwid

name: Gremlin Horn
description: Whenever an enemy dies, gain [Energy] and draw 1 card.
flavor_text: "Gremlin Nobs are capable of growing until the day they die. Remarkable." - Ranwid

name: Horn Cleat
description: At the start of your 2nd turn, gain 14 Block.
flavor_text: Pleasant to hold in the hand. What was it for?

name: Ink Bottle
description: Whenever you play 10 cards, draw 1 card.
flavor_text: Once exhausted, appears to refill itself in a different color.

name: Kunai
description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 [Dexterity].
flavor_text: A blade favored by assassins for its lethality at range.

name: Letter Opener
description: Every time you play 3 Skills in a single turn, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.
flavor_text: Unnaturally sharp.

name: Matryoshka
description: The next 2 non-Boss chests you open contain 2 Relics.
flavor_text: A stackable set of painted dolls. The paint depicts an unknown bird with white eyes and blue feathers.

name: Meat on the Bone
description: If your HP is at or below 50% at the end of combat, heal 12 HP.
flavor_text: The meat keeps replenishing, never seeming to fully run out.

name: Mercury Hourglass
description: At the start of your turn, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
flavor_text: An enchanted hourglass that endlessly drips.

name: Molten Egg
description: Whenever you add an Attack into your deck, Upgrade it.
flavor_text: The egg of a Phoenix. It glows red hot with a simmering lava.

name: Mummified Hand
description: Whenever you play a Power card, a random card in your hand costs 0 that turn.
flavor_text: Frequently twitches, especially when your pulse is high.

name: Ninja Scroll
description: At the start of each combat, add 3 Shivs into your hand.
flavor_text: Contains the secrets of assassination.

name: Ornamental Fan
description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 4 Block.
flavor_text: The fan seems to extend and harden as blood is spilled.

name: Pantograph
description: At the start of Boss combats, heal 25 HP.
flavor_text: "Solid foundations are not accidental. Tools for planning are a must." - The Architect

name: Paper Krane
description: Enemies with [Weak] deal 40% less damage rather than 25%.
flavor_text: An origami of a creature from a past age.

name: Paper Phrog
description: Enemies with [Vulnerable] take 75% more damage rather than 50%.
flavor_text: The paper continually folds and unfolds itself into the shape of a small creature.

name: Pear
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 10.
flavor_text: A common fruit before the Spireblight.

name: Question Card
description: Future card rewards have 1 additional card to choose from.
flavor_text: "Those with more choices minimize the downside to chaos." - Kublai the Great

name: Self-Forming Clay
description: Whenever you lose HP, gain 3 Block next turn.
flavor_text: "Most curious! It appears to form itself loosely on my thoughts! Tele-clay?" - Ranwid

name: Shuriken
description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 [Strength].
flavor_text: Lightweight throwing weapons. Recommend going for the eyes.

name: Singing Bowl
description: When adding cards into your deck, you may raise your Max HP by 2 instead.
flavor_text: This well-used artifact rings out with a beautiful melody when struck.

name: Strike Dummy
description: Cards containing "Strike" deal 3 additional damage.
flavor_text: It's beat up.

name: Sundial
description: Every 3 times you shuffle your draw pile, gain [Energy] [Energy] .
flavor_text: "Early man's foolish obsession with time caused them to look to the sky for guidance, hoping for something permanent." - Zoroth

name: Symbiotic Virus
description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Dark.
flavor_text: A little bit of bad can do a lot of good...

name: Teardrop Locket
description: Start each combat in Calm.
flavor_text: Its owner blind, its contents unseen.

name: The Courier
description: The Merchant restocks cards, relics, and potions. All prices are reduced by 20%.
flavor_text: The Merchant's personal pet!
spawn_conditions: Below floor 49 and not in a shop

name: Toxic Egg
description: Whenever you add a Skill into your deck, Upgrade it.
flavor_text: "What a marvelous discovery! This appears to be the inert egg of some magical creature. Who or what created this?" - Ranwid

name: White Beast Statue
description: Potions always appear in combat rewards.
flavor_text: A small white statue of a creature you have never seen before.

name: Bird-Faced Urn
description: Whenever you play a Power card, heal 2 HP.
flavor_text: This urn shows the crow god Mazaleth looking mischievous.

name: Calipers
description: At the start of your turn, lose 15 Block rather than all of your Block.
flavor_text: "Mechanical precision leads to greatness" - The Architect

name: Captain's Wheel
description: At the start of your 3rd turn, gain 18 Block.
flavor_text: Wooden trinket carved with delicate precision. A name is carved into it but the language is foreign.

name: Champion Belt
description: Whenever you apply [Vulnerable], apply 1 [Weak].
flavor_text: Only the greatest may wear this belt.

name: Charon's Ashes
description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
flavor_text: Charon was said to be the god of rebirth, eternally dying and reviving in a burst of flame.

name: Cloak Clasp
description: At the end of your turn, gain 1 Block for each card in your hand.
flavor_text: A simple but sturdy design.

name: Dead Branch
description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, add a random card into your hand.
flavor_text: The branch of a tree from a forgotten era.

name: Du-Vu Doll
description: For each Curse in your deck, start each combat with 1 [Strength].
flavor_text: A doll devised to gain strength from malicious energy.

name: Emotion Chip
description: If you lost HP during the previous turn, trigger the passive ability of all Orbs at the start of your turn.

name: Fossilized Helix
description: Prevent the first time you would lose HP each combat.
flavor_text: Seemingly indestructible, you wonder what kind of creature this belonged to.

name: Gambling Chip
description: At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards, then draw that many cards.
flavor_text: You can see a small inscription on one side. It reads: "Bear's Lucky Chip!"

name: Ginger
description: You can no longer become Weakened.
flavor_text: A potent tool in many tonics.

name: Girya
description: You can now gain [Strength] at Rest Sites (up to 3 times).
flavor_text: This Girya is unfathomably heavy. You could train with this to get significantly stronger.

name: Golden Eye
description: Whenever you Scry, Scry 2 additional cards.
flavor_text: See into the minds of those nearby, predicting their future moves.

name: Ice Cream
description: Energy is now conserved between turns.
flavor_text: "Delicious!"

name: Incense Burner
description: Every 6 turns, gain 1 [Intangible].
flavor_text: The smoke imbues its owner with the spirit of the burned.

name: Lizard Tail
description: When you would die, heal to 50% of your Max HP instead (works once).
flavor_text: A fake tail to trick enemies during combat.

name: Magic Flower
description: Healing is 50% more effective during combat.
flavor_text: A flower long thought extinct, somehow preserved in perfect condition.

name: Mango
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 14.
flavor_text: The most coveted forgotten fruit. Impeccably preserved with no signs of Spireblight.

name: Old Coin
description: Upon pickup, gain 300 Gold.
flavor_text: Unique coins are highly valued by merchants for their historical value and rare metallic composition.
spawn_conditions: Below floor 49 and not in a shop

name: Peace Pipe
description: You can now remove cards from your deck at Rest Sites.
flavor_text: Clears the mind and cleanses the soul.

name: Pocketwatch
description: Whenever you play 3 or less cards during your turn, draw 3 additional cards at the start of your next turn.
flavor_text: The hands seem stuck on the 3 o'clock position.

name: Prayer Wheel
description: Normal enemies drop an additional card reward.
flavor_text: The wheel continues to spin, never stopping.

name: Shovel
description: You can now Dig for relics at Rest Sites.
flavor_text: The Spire houses all number of relics from past civilizations and powerful adventurers lost to time. Time to go dig them up!

name: Stone Calendar
description: At the end of turn 7, deal 52 damage to ALL enemies.
flavor_text: The passage of time is imperceptible in the Spire.

name: The Specimen
description: Whenever an enemy dies, transfer any [Poison] it has to a random enemy.
flavor_text: "Fascinating! I found a mutated creature demonstrating astounding toxic properties. Storing a sample for later examination." - Ranwid

name: Thread and Needle
description: Start each combat with 4 [Plated Armor].
flavor_text: Wrapping the magical thread around your body, you feel harder to the touch.

name: Tingsha
description: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, deal 3 damage to a random enemy.
flavor_text: The sound this instrument generates seems to be capable of reverberating to painful levels of volume.

name: Torii
description: Whenever you would receive 5 or less unblocked attack damage, reduce it to 1.
flavor_text: Holding the small Torii, you feel a sense of calm and safety drift through your mind.

name: Tough Bandages
description: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, gain 3 Block.
flavor_text: Loss gives strength.

name: Tungsten Rod
description: Whenever you would lose HP, lose 1 less.
flavor_text: It's very very heavy.

name: Turnip
description: You can no longer become Frail.
flavor_text: Best with Ginger.

name: Unceasing Top
description: Whenever you have no cards in hand during your turn, draw a card.
flavor_text: The top continues to spin effortlessly as if you were in a dream.

name: Wing Boots
description: You may ignore paths when choosing the next room to travel to 3 times.
flavor_text: Stylish.

name: Astrolabe
description: Upon pickup, Transform 3 cards, then Upgrade them.
flavor_text: A tool to glean invaluable knowledge from the stars.

name: Black Blood
description: Replaces Burning Blood. At the end of combat, heal 12 HP.
flavor_text: The rage grows darker.
spawn_conditions: You have the relic Burning Blood

name: Black Star
description: Elites drop an additional relic when defeated.
flavor_text: Originally discovered in the town of the serpent, beside a solitary candle.

name: Busted Crown
description: Gain [Energy] at the start of your turn. Future card rewards have 2 less cards to choose from.
flavor_text: The Champ's crown... or a pale imitation?

name: Calling Bell
description: Upon pickup, obtain a unique Curse and 3 relics.
flavor_text: This dark iron bell rang 3 times when you found it, but now stays silent.

name: Coffee Dripper
description: Gain [Energy] at the start of your turn. You can no longer Rest at Rest Sites.
flavor_text: "Yes, another cup please. Back to work. Back to work!" - The Architect

name: Cursed Key
description: Gain [Energy] at the start of your turn. Whenever you open a non-Boss chest, obtain a Curse.
flavor_text: You can feel the malicious energy emanating from the key. Power comes at a price.

name: Ectoplasm
description: Gain [Energy] at the start of your turn. You can no longer gain Gold.
flavor_text: This blob of slime and energy seems to pulse with life.

name: Empty Cage
description: Upon pickup, remove 2 cards from your deck.
flavor_text: "How unusual to cage that which you worship." - Ranwid

name: Frozen Core
description: Replaces Cracked Core. If you end your turn with any empty Orb slots, Channel 1 Frost.
flavor_text: The crack in your core has been filled with a pulsating cold energy.
spawn_conditions: You have the relic Cracked Core

name: Fusion Hammer
description: Gain [Energy] at the start of your turn. You can no longer Smith at Rest Sites.
flavor_text: Once wielded, the owner can never let go.

name: Holy Water
description: Replaces Pure Water. At the start of each combat, add 3 Miracles into your hand.
flavor_text: Collected from a time before the Spire.
spawn_conditions: You have the relic Pure Water

name: Hovering Kite
description: The first time you discard a card each turn, gain [Energy] .
flavor_text: The Kite floats around you in battle, propelled by a mysterious force.

name: Inserter
description: Every 2 turns, gain 1 Orb slot.
flavor_text: Push. Pull. Stack. Repeat.

name: Mark of Pain
description: Gain [Energy] at the start of your turn. At the start of combat, shuffle 2 Wounds into your draw pile.
flavor_text: This brand was used by the northern tribes to signify warriors who had mastered pain in battle.

name: Nuclear Battery
description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Plasma.
flavor_text: Ooooh...

name: Pandora's Box
description: Upon pickup, Transform all Strike and Defend cards.
flavor_text: You have a bad feeling about opening this.

name: Philosopher's Stone
description: Gain [Energy] at the start of your turn. ALL enemies start combat with 1 [Strength].
flavor_text: Raw energy emanates from the stone, empowering all nearby.

name: Ring of the Serpent
description: Replaces Ring of the Snake. At the start of your turn, draw 1 additional card.
flavor_text: Your ring has morphed and changed forms.
spawn_conditions: You have the relic Ring of the Snake

name: Runic Cube
description: Whenever you lose HP, draw 1 card.
flavor_text: The runes are indecipherable.

name: Runic Dome
description: Gain [Energy] at the start of your turn. You can no longer see enemy intents.
flavor_text: The runes are indecipherable.

name: Runic Pyramid
description: At the end of your turn, you no longer discard your hand.
flavor_text: The runes are indecipherable.

name: Sacred Bark
description: Double the effectiveness of potions.
flavor_text: A bark rumored to originate from the World tree.

name: Slaver's Collar
description: During Boss and Elite combats, gain [Energy] at the start of your turn.
flavor_text: Rusty miserable chains.

name: Snecko Eye
description: At the start of your turn, draw 2 additional cards. Start each combat Confused.
flavor_text: An eye of a fallen snecko. Much larger than you imagined.

name: Sozu
description: Gain [Energy] at the start of your turn. You can no longer obtain potions.
flavor_text: You notice that magical liquids seem to lose their properties when near this relic.

name: Tiny House
description: Upon pickup, obtain 1 potion. Gain 50 Gold. Raise your Max HP by 5. Obtain 1 card. Upgrade 1 random card.
flavor_text: "A near perfect implementation of miniaturization. My finest work to date, but still not adequate." - The Architect

name: Velvet Choker
description: Gain [Energy] at the start of your turn. You cannot play more than 6 cards per turn.
flavor_text: "Immense power, but too limited." - Kublai the Great

name: Violet Lotus
description: Whenever you exit Calm, gain an additional [Energy] .
flavor_text: The old texts describe that the surface of "mana pools" were littered with these flowers.

name: Wrist Blade
description: Attacks that cost 0 deal 4 additional damage.
flavor_text: Handy for assassinations.

name: Brimstone
description: At the start of your turn, gain 2 [Strength] and ALL enemies gain 1 [Strength].
flavor_text: Emanates an infernal heat.

name: Cauldron
description: Upon pickup, brews 5 random potions.
flavor_text: The Merchant is actually a rather skilled potion brewer. Buy 4 get 1 free.

name: Chemical X
description: The effects of your cost X cards are increased by 2.
flavor_text: WARNING: Do not combine with sugar, spice, and everything nice.

name: Clockwork Souvenir
description: Start each combat with 1 [Artifact].
flavor_text: "So many intricate gears."

name: Dolly's Mirror
description: Upon pickup, obtain an additional copy of a card in your deck.
flavor_text: "I look funny in this."

name: Frozen Eye
description: When viewing your Draw Pile, the cards are now shown in order.
flavor_text: Staring into the eye, you see a glimpse of your future.

name: Hand Drill
description: Whenever you break an enemy's Block, apply 2 [Vulnerable].
flavor_text: "Spirals are dangerous."

name: Lee's Waffle
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 7 and heal all of your HP.
flavor_text: "Tastiest treat you will find in all the Spire! Baked today just for you."

name: Medical Kit
description: Unplayable Status cards can now be played. Whenever you play a Status card, Exhaust it.
flavor_text: "Has everything you need! Anti-itch, anti-burn, anti-venom, and more!"

name: Melange
description: Whenever you shuffle your draw pile, Scry 3.
flavor_text: Mysterious sands from an unknown origin. Smells of cinnamon.

name: Membership Card
description: 50% discount on all products!
flavor_text: "Bonus membership offer for my most valuable customers!"

name: Orange Pellets
description: Whenever you play a Power, Attack, and Skill in the same turn, remove all of your debuffs.
flavor_text: "Made from various fungi found throughout the Spire, they will stave off any affliction."

name: Orrery
description: Upon pickup, choose and add 5 cards to your deck.
flavor_text: "Once you understand the universe..." - Zoroth

name: Prismatic Shard
description: Combat reward screens now contain Colorless cards and cards from other colors.
flavor_text: Looking through the shard, you are able to see entirely new perspectives.

name: Runic Capacitor
description: Start each combat with 3 additional Orb slots.
flavor_text: More is better.

name: Sling of Courage
description: Start each Elite combat with 2 [Strength].
flavor_text: "A handy tool for dealing with particularly tough opponents."

name: Strange Spoon
description: Cards which Exhaust when played will instead discard 50% of the time.
flavor_text: Staring at the spoon, it appears to bend and twist around before your eyes.

name: The Abacus
description: Whenever you shuffle your draw pile, gain 6 Block.
flavor_text: "One...Two...Three..."

name: Toolbox
description: At the start of each combat, choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards and add the chosen card into your hand.
flavor_text: A tool for every job.

name: Twisted Funnel
description: At the start of each combat, apply 4 [Poison] to ALL enemies.
flavor_text: "I wouldn't drink out of it."

name: Bloody Idol
description: Whenever you gain Gold, heal 5 HP.
flavor_text: The idol now weeps a constant stream of blood.

name: Cultist Headpiece
description: You feel more talkative.
flavor_text: Part of the Flock!

name: Enchiridion
description: At the start of each combat, add a random Power card into your hand. It costs 0 for that turn.
flavor_text: The legendary journal of an ancient lich.

name: Face Of Cleric
description: At the end of combat, raise your Max HP by 1.
flavor_text: Everyone loves Cleric.

name: Golden Idol
description: Enemies drop 25% more Gold.
flavor_text: Made of solid gold, you feel richer just holding it.

name: Gremlin Visage
description: Start each combat with 1 [Weak].
flavor_text: Time to run.

name: Mark of the Bloom
description: You can no longer heal.
flavor_text: In the Beyond, thoughts and reality are one.

name: Mutagenic Strength
description: Start each combat with 3 [Strength]. At the end of your first turn, lose 3 [Strength].
flavor_text: "The results seem fleeting, triggering when the subject is in danger." - Unknown

name: N'loth's Gift
description: Triple the chance of finding Rare cards from combat rewards.
flavor_text: The strange gift from N'loth. Whenever you try and unwrap it, another wrapped box of the same size lies within.

name: N'loth's Hungry Face
description: The next non-Boss chest you open is empty.
flavor_text: You feel hungry.

name: Necronomicon
description: The first Attack played each turn that costs 2 or more is played twice. Upon pickup, obtain a special Curse.
flavor_text: Only a fool would try and harness this evil power. At night your dreams are haunted by images of the book devouring your mind.

name: Neow's Lament
description: Enemies in your first 3 combats will have 1 HP.
flavor_text: The blessing of lamentation bestowed by Neow.

name: Nilry's Codex
description: At the end of your turn, you may shuffle 1 of 3 random cards into your draw pile.
flavor_text: Crafted by the infamous game master himself. Said to expand one's mind.

name: Odd Mushroom
description: When [Vulnerable], take 25% more attack damage rather than 50%.
flavor_text: "After consuming trichella parastius I felt larger and less... susceptible." - Ranwid

name: Red Mask
description: At the start of each combat, apply 1 [Weak] to ALL enemies.
flavor_text: This very stylish looking mask belongs to the leader of the Red Mask Bandits. Technically that makes you the leader now?

name: Spirit Poop
description: It's unpleasant.
flavor_text: The charred remains of your offering to the spirits.

name: Ssserpent Head
description: Whenever you enter a ? room, gain 50 Gold.
flavor_text: The most fulfilling of lives is that in which you can buy anything!

name: Warped Tongs
description: At the start of your turn, Upgrade a random card in your hand for the rest of combat.
flavor_text: The cursed tongs emit a strong desire to return to where they were stolen from.

name: Accursed
description: Whenever you defeat a Boss, obtain 2 random Curses.

name: Ancient Augmentation
description: Enemies start combat with 1 [Artifact], 10 [Plated Armor], and 10 [Regenerate].

name: Grotesque Trophy
description: Upon pickup, obtain 3 Prides.

name: Hauntings
description: Enemies start combat with 1 [Intangible].

name: Mimic Infestation
description: Treasure rooms in future acts are replaced by Elites. Elites no longer drop Relics.

name: Muzzle
description: You can no longer increase your Max HP. All healing is halved.

name: Post-Durian
description: Lose 50% of your Max HP.

name: Scatterbrain
description: Draw 1 less card a turn.

name: Shield of Blight
description: Enemies have 50% more HP.

name: Spear of Blight
description: Enemies deal 100% more damage.

name: Time Maze
description: You cannot play more than 15 cards per turn.

name: Twisting Mind
description: At the end of your turn, add 1 random Status card to the top of your draw pile.

name: Void Essence
description: Lose 1 Energy permanently.

name: Circlet
description: Collect as many as you can.
flavor_text: You ran out of relics to find. Impressive!

name: Red Circlet
description: You ran out of relics. Impressive!
flavor_text: Looks very pretty.
